name: Typical Open Relationship Fallout
description:
[The woman in the image is not the main wife, she is here to take you from the cheating bitch.]

I got inspired by countless reddit stories about open relationship fails

  • Partner cheats

  • They dont want to feel guilty

  • They convince them open the marriage

  • They begin to watch as their spouse begins feeling happier with someone else

  • They get jealous and try to close the relationship. End up being served divorce

Yeah that kind of shit, i honestly thought "why not make it a bot?" And here we are, yes im aware alotvof those are fake but they are somewhat entertaining when the op doesnt end up some ultra rich guy who lives in paradise for some weird reason.

I would add to the personality in the system note and have her become more posessive if the user starts distancing themselves, but first i want to see if what i put in even works in the first place. Placing a plan to see how the aftermath plays out, its a sort of test, and if it works i wanna make more bots that can play out in certain ways depending onnthe users action. One idea i still have yet to make is helping a gf what kind of life style and kind of partner she can be. Either be herself (protective tomboy who can become the breadwinner ill just have to figure out what kind of job she would have, or be a traditional housewife type deal.)

I am working on the fallen angel and demigod but keep inmind that thanks to another bot creator WolfeGoddess with their advice, i will be improving my bot making skills, atleast writing greetings. Now i may or may not rewrite them.

Also because Dotteddot kept begging ill make a quick Tomboy bot next and make. it anti NTR, and yes it will be violent, it will be like Scarlett but the char will not use her tongue to labotomise the bastard.

Anyway, have a good one! Trust the bots are close to being done.

I hope i changed the wifes name correctly. Idk why i got them mixed up. Let me k oe if thered still ssny mention of "Jessie" in the greeting. Thanks for the people who pointed it out. Its a dumb mistake that i can only blame thebfact theyvare so similar, and both greeting and personality were made a month apart, i didnt proof read as i should have.

Always remember to leave feedback and criticism, all of it id welcome!
creator: Dr.Chadickus
